expanded_market_policy.reason: Historical profitability is unvalidated, the nominal holdout has been used for development feedback, source prices are stale, and conditional fixtures require intervening results.
expanded_market_policy.selection_rule: rank independent structural-model EV and stressed EV; use market-implied probability only as a disagreement/risk diagnostic, never as an input to the probability evaluating that same quote

research_mode_policy.why_selected: Dixon-Coles is the selected tested shadow candidate because it is football-specific, low-parameter, and reproducible with the available score data. Other registered candidates have not all been fit and compared, so this is not a claim that Dixon-Coles is globally best. High-capacity temporal graph and sequence models remain blocked by the sample-size/edge-count promotion gate.
research_mode_policy.why_not_promoted: Shadow paired-bootstrap intervals cross zero and no timestamp-verified historical closing odds exist for profitability validation.

promotion_requirements.validation: nested walk-forward selection, untouched holdout superiority, calibration checks, multiple-testing control, and closing-line ROI/CLV validation

evaluation_governance.reason: The nominal holdout informed prior development decisions and cannot be described as untouched or confirmatory.

warning.en: No stake is allocated unless every actionability gate passes. Historical profitability is not validated, so this release allocates zero.
warning.es: No se asigna monto salvo que todas las puertas de acción pasen. La rentabilidad histórica no está validada, por lo que esta versión asigna cero.

risk_note.en: Gross return assumes every selection fully wins; Asian pushes or half-results can reduce it. The model-estimated net is not historically validated.
risk_note.es: El retorno bruto supone que todas las selecciones ganan completamente; nulos o medias liquidaciones asiáticas pueden reducirlo. El neto estimado no está validado históricamente.

risk_note.en: Gross return assumes every selection fully wins; Asian pushes or half-results can reduce it. The model-estimated net is not historically validated.
risk_note.es: El retorno bruto supone que todas las selecciones ganan completamente; nulos o medias liquidaciones asiáticas pueden reducirlo. El neto estimado no está validado históricamente.

warning.en: Hypothetical budgeting aid only. It is not an authorized stake, profit forecast, or instruction to bet. The simulator allocates only to rows that pass the selected risk, EV, stress, and fair-price filters.
warning.es: Solo ayuda hipotética de presupuesto. No es monto autorizado, pronóstico de beneficio ni instrucción para apostar. El simulador asigna solo a filas que pasan los filtros de riesgo, EV, estrés y precio justo.

predictions.venue: New York New Jersey Stadium, East Rutherford, New Jersey, USA

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

explanation.en: Research-only double-discount check: the saved market implied probability must be no more than half the model decision probability. This is a margin-of-safety flag, not proof of profit or authorization to bet.
explanation.es: Chequeo de doble descuento solo de investigación: la probabilidad implícita de la cuota guardada debe ser como máximo la mitad de la probabilidad de decisión del modelo. Es una señal de margen de seguridad, no prueba de beneficio ni autorización para apostar.

en: Small, shifted historical holdout.
Screenshot price and team information can move before kickoff.
Historical profitability is not validated.

La rentabilidad histórica no está validada.

why_ranked.es: Clasificada por el modelo sombra de investigación contra las mismas cuotas de capturas. Es análisis de sensibilidad, no reemplazo de producción.

en.title: Panama win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 4.4% means roughly 4 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Panamá
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 4.4% significa aproximadamente 4 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 23.4% means roughly 23 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 23.4% significa aproximadamente 23 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: England win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 72.2% means roughly 72 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Inglaterra
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 72.2% significa aproximadamente 72 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Panama
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.48 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Panamá
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.48 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: England
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 2.43 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Inglaterra
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 2.43 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 55.6% is the model probability; 1.80 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 55.6% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.80 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 44.4% is the model probability; 2.25 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 44.4% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.25 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 34.8% is the model probability; 2.87 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 34.8% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.87 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 65.2% is the model probability; 1.53 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 65.2% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.53 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Panama -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 5.5% is the model win probability; 18.02 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Panamá -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 5.5% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 18.02 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

warning.en: A true guaranteed arbitrage requires all mutually exclusive outcomes to be covered and the inverse-odds sum to be below 1. Two-outcome hedges can still lose the full stake on the uncovered outcome.
warning.es: Un arbitraje garantizado real requiere cubrir todos los resultados mutuamente excluyentes y que la suma de inversas de cuotas sea menor que 1. Las coberturas de dos resultados aún pueden perder todo el monto si cae el resultado no cubierto.

explanation.en: Research-only double-discount check: the saved market implied probability must be no more than half the model decision probability. This is a margin-of-safety flag, not proof of profit or authorization to bet.
explanation.es: Chequeo de doble descuento solo de investigación: la probabilidad implícita de la cuota guardada debe ser como máximo la mitad de la probabilidad de decisión del modelo. Es una señal de margen de seguridad, no prueba de beneficio ni autorización para apostar.

en: Small, shifted historical holdout.
Screenshot price and team information can move before kickoff.
Historical profitability is not validated.
es: Holdout histórico pequeño y con cambio de régimen.
La cuota y la información de equipos pueden cambiar antes del inicio.
La rentabilidad histórica no está validada.

why_ranked.en: Ranked by conservative expected-value utility after market disagreement and family-risk penalties.
why_ranked.es: Clasificada por utilidad conservadora de valor esperado tras penalizar desacuerdo de mercado y riesgo del mercado.

explanation.en: PASS under this lens: candidate divergence 13.2pp vs maximum 22.5pp; stressed EV 7.9% vs minimum -20.0%; risk grade C vs allowed A/B/C/D; fair-price gate met.

explanation.en: PASS under this lens: candidate divergence 13.2pp vs maximum 15.0pp; stressed EV 7.9% vs minimum -8.0%; risk grade C vs allowed A/B/C/D; fair-price gate met.

explanation.en: HALT under this lens: candidate divergence 13.2pp vs maximum 7.5pp; stressed EV 7.9% vs minimum 2.0%; risk grade C vs allowed A/B; fair-price gate met.
explanation.es: HALT con este lente: desacuerdo 13.2pp frente al máximo 7.5pp; EV estresado 7.9% frente al mínimo 2.0%; grado de riesgo C frente a los permitidos A/B; umbral de cuota justa cumplido.

explanation.en: HALT under this lens: candidate divergence 13.2pp vs maximum 5.0pp; stressed EV 7.9% vs minimum 3.0%; risk grade C vs allowed A; fair-price gate met.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Panama lost 1-0 to Ghana in their opener. England beat Croatia 4-2, with Harry Kane scoring twice. Their June 23 second matches had not occurred by the cutoff, so final-round team news was unavailable.
research.injuries_suspensions: England: Tino Livramento was ruled out of the tournament with a calf injury and replaced by Trevoh Chalobah. Bukayo Saka was managing an Achilles issue; Declan Rice said he was fit despite neural pain in his upper hamstring/lower back; Marcus Rashford had returned to training after a minor muscular issue. Panama injuries were unavailable. Suspensions for June 27 were unavailable because of the June 23 matches.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: England's right side was expected to feature Noni Madueke with Saka's minutes managed, while Rice was available and Kane was the central striker; rotation for the third match could not be assessed before June 23. Panama's confirmed XI and credible predicted changes were unavailable.
research.motivation_group_state: Group L as of June 21: England 3 pts, GD +2; Panama 0 pts, GD -1. Both had June 23 matches, so England's qualification/rotation incentive and Panama's survival requirement for June 27 were unavailable at the cutoff.
research.weather_venue_notes: New York New Jersey Stadium is the open-air MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, with a 17:00 local kickoff. Heat, humidity and thunderstorms are relevant seasonal risks, but a reliable match-time forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Croatia win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 41.2% means roughly 41 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Croacia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 41.2% significa aproximadamente 41 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.5% means roughly 32 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.5% significa aproximadamente 32 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Ghana win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 27.2% means roughly 27 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Ghana
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 27.2% significa aproximadamente 27 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Croatia
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.58 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Croacia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.58 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Ghana
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.19 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Ghana
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.19 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 52.4% is the model probability; 1.91 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 52.4% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.91 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 47.6% is the model probability; 2.10 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 47.6% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.10 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 55.3% is the model probability; 1.81 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 55.3% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.81 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 44.7% is the model probability; 2.24 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 44.7% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.24 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Croatia -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 46.5% is the model win probability; 2.15 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Croacia -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 46.5% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 2.15 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

warning.en: A true guaranteed arbitrage requires all mutually exclusive outcomes to be covered and the inverse-odds sum to be below 1. Two-outcome hedges can still lose the full stake on the uncovered outcome.
warning.es: Un arbitraje garantizado real requiere cubrir todos los resultados mutuamente excluyentes y que la suma de inversas de cuotas sea menor que 1. Las coberturas de dos resultados aún pueden perder todo el monto si cae el resultado no cubierto.

explanation.en: Research-only double-discount check: the saved market implied probability must be no more than half the model decision probability. This is a margin-of-safety flag, not proof of profit or authorization to bet.
explanation.es: Chequeo de doble descuento solo de investigación: la probabilidad implícita de la cuota guardada debe ser como máximo la mitad de la probabilidad de decisión del modelo. Es una señal de margen de seguridad, no prueba de beneficio ni autorización para apostar.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Croatia lost 4-2 to England in their opener; Ghana beat Panama 1-0. Both had an intervening June 23 match after the cutoff, so form, cards and lineup developments entering June 27 were unavailable.
research.injuries_suspensions: Croatia: no match-specific confirmed injury or suspension was found by the cutoff. Ghana: Thomas Partey missed the Canada-based opener because he was denied entry but was reported eligible for the June 23 match in the United States; his June 27 status was not a fitness issue but remained unavailable after the intervening game. Other injuries/suspensions: unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Croatia could retain its veteran midfield while addressing defensive problems exposed by England, but specific changes were unavailable. Ghana's Partey could become a midfield option in the United States; selection after the June 23 England match was unknowable at the cutoff.
research.motivation_group_state: Group L as of June 21: Ghana 3 pts, GD +1; Croatia 0 pts, GD -2. Ghana still had England and Croatia still had Panama on June 23, so the exact final-round qualification state was unavailable. This fixture could decide a top-two or best-third-place berth, but no precise points requirement was knowable.
research.weather_venue_notes: Philadelphia Stadium is the open-air Lincoln Financial Field, with a 17:00 local kickoff. Late-June heat and thunderstorms can matter; a reliable match-time forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Colombia win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 24.6% means roughly 25 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Colombia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 24.6% significa aproximadamente 25 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 30.5% means roughly 31 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 30.5% significa aproximadamente 31 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Portugal win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 44.9% means roughly 45 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Portugal
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 44.9% significa aproximadamente 45 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Colombia
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.11 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Colombia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.11 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Portugal
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.68 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Portugal
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.68 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 52.7% is the model probability; 1.90 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 52.7% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.90 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 47.3% is the model probability; 2.11 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 47.3% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.11 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 54.5% is the model probability; 1.84 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 54.5% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.84 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 45.5% is the model probability; 2.20 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 45.5% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.20 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Colombia -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 25.2% is the model win probability; 3.97 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Colombia -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 25.2% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 3.97 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

warning.en: A true guaranteed arbitrage requires all mutually exclusive outcomes to be covered and the inverse-odds sum to be below 1. Two-outcome hedges can still lose the full stake on the uncovered outcome.
warning.es: Un arbitraje garantizado real requiere cubrir todos los resultados mutuamente excluyentes y que la suma de inversas de cuotas sea menor que 1. Las coberturas de dos resultados aún pueden perder todo el monto si cae el resultado no cubierto.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Colombia beat Uzbekistan 3-1 in their opener; Portugal drew 1-1 with Congo DR. Colombia midfielder Juan Camilo Portilla suffered a family bereavement during camp, but the cited report did not say he left camp or was unavailable. Both teams had June 23 matches after the cutoff.
research.injuries_suspensions: No match-specific confirmed injury or suspension for Colombia or Portugal was found by the cutoff. Portilla's bereavement is team news, not an injury, and his availability was unavailable. June 23 cards could create June 27 suspensions, so final suspension status was unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Colombia's primary attacking creators were Luis Diaz and James Rodriguez. Portugal's key selection question remained how Cristiano Ronaldo fit with Bruno Fernandes and a tactically flexible back-three/back-four structure. Changes after June 23 were unknowable.
research.motivation_group_state: Group K as of June 21: Colombia 3 pts, GD +2; Portugal 1 pt, GD 0. Colombia still had Congo DR and Portugal had Uzbekistan on June 23, so the exact first-place, qualification and rotation implications for June 27 were unavailable.
research.weather_venue_notes: Miami Stadium is the open-air Hard Rock Stadium in Miami Gardens, with a 19:30 local kickoff. Heat, humidity and thunderstorms are material risks; a reliable match-time forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

explanation.en: Research-only double-discount check: the saved market implied probability must be no more than half the model decision probability. This is a margin-of-safety flag, not proof of profit or authorization to bet.
explanation.es: Chequeo de doble descuento solo de investigación: la probabilidad implícita de la cuota guardada debe ser como máximo la mitad de la probabilidad de decisión del modelo. Es una señal de margen de seguridad, no prueba de beneficio ni autorización para apostar.

en.title: Congo DR win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 34.9% means roughly 35 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de RD Congo
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 34.9% significa aproximadamente 35 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 33.4% means roughly 33 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 33.4% significa aproximadamente 33 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Uzbekistan win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.7% means roughly 32 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Uzbekistán
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.7% significa aproximadamente 32 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Congo DR
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.42 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: RD Congo
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.42 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Uzbekistan
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.33 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Uzbekistán
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.33 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 52.0% is the model probability; 1.92 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 52.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.92 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.0% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 55.9% is the model probability; 1.79 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 55.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.79 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 44.1% is the model probability; 2.27 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 44.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.27 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Congo DR -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 39.3% is the model win probability; 2.54 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: RD Congo -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 39.3% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 2.54 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

warning.en: A true guaranteed arbitrage requires all mutually exclusive outcomes to be covered and the inverse-odds sum to be below 1. Two-outcome hedges can still lose the full stake on the uncovered outcome.
warning.es: Un arbitraje garantizado real requiere cubrir todos los resultados mutuamente excluyentes y que la suma de inversas de cuotas sea menor que 1. Las coberturas de dos resultados aún pueden perder todo el monto si cae el resultado no cubierto.

explanation.en: Research-only double-discount check: the saved market implied probability must be no more than half the model decision probability. This is a margin-of-safety flag, not proof of profit or authorization to bet.
explanation.es: Chequeo de doble descuento solo de investigación: la probabilidad implícita de la cuota guardada debe ser como máximo la mitad de la probabilidad de decisión del modelo. Es una señal de margen de seguridad, no prueba de beneficio ni autorización para apostar.

en: Small, shifted historical holdout.
Screenshot price and team information can move before kickoff.
Historical profitability is not validated.
es: Holdout histórico pequeño y con cambio de régimen.
La cuota y la información de equipos pueden cambiar antes del inicio.
La rentabilidad histórica no está validada.

why_ranked.en: Ranked by conservative expected-value utility after market disagreement and family-risk penalties.
why_ranked.es: Clasificada por utilidad conservadora de valor esperado tras penalizar desacuerdo de mercado y riesgo del mercado.

explanation.en: Research-only double-discount check: the saved market implied probability must be no more than half the model decision probability. This is a margin-of-safety flag, not proof of profit or authorization to bet.
explanation.es: Chequeo de doble descuento solo de investigación: la probabilidad implícita de la cuota guardada debe ser como máximo la mitad de la probabilidad de decisión del modelo. Es una señal de margen de seguridad, no prueba de beneficio ni autorización para apostar.

en: Verify current app price and settlement line.
Verify lineup, injury, motivation, and weather freshness.
Compare production and research score distributions.
Require chronological out-of-sample evidence before changing production thresholds.

Verifica vigencia de alineación, lesiones, motivación y clima.
Compara distribuciones de marcador de producción e investigación.
Exige evidencia cronológica fuera de muestra antes de cambiar umbrales de producción.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: No fixture-specific OSINT note was available by the active June 27 cutoff; report uses schedule and verified-result context only.
research.injuries_suspensions: Unavailable in canonical research files by cutoff.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Unavailable in canonical research files by cutoff.
research.motivation_group_state: Knockout or final-round qualification context is inferred only from verified schedule/result sources.

predictions.venue: Kansas City Stadium, Kansas City, Missouri, USA

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Algeria win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 27.4% means roughly 27 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Argelia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 27.4% significa aproximadamente 27 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.6% means roughly 32 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.6% significa aproximadamente 32 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Austria win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 40.9% means roughly 41 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Austria
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 40.9% significa aproximadamente 41 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Algeria
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.20 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Argelia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.20 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Austria
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.58 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Austria
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.58 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 52.4% is the model probability; 1.91 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 52.4% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.91 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 47.6% is the model probability; 2.10 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 47.6% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.10 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 55.3% is the model probability; 1.81 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 55.3% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.81 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 44.7% is the model probability; 2.24 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 44.7% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.24 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Algeria -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 28.9% is the model win probability; 3.46 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Argelia -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 28.9% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 3.46 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

warning.en: A true guaranteed arbitrage requires all mutually exclusive outcomes to be covered and the inverse-odds sum to be below 1. Two-outcome hedges can still lose the full stake on the uncovered outcome.
warning.es: Un arbitraje garantizado real requiere cubrir todos los resultados mutuamente excluyentes y que la suma de inversas de cuotas sea menor que 1. Las coberturas de dos resultados aún pueden perder todo el monto si cae el resultado no cubierto.

explanation.en: Research-only double-discount check: the saved market implied probability must be no more than half the model decision probability. This is a margin-of-safety flag, not proof of profit or authorization to bet.
explanation.es: Chequeo de doble descuento solo de investigación: la probabilidad implícita de la cuota guardada debe ser como máximo la mitad de la probabilidad de decisión del modelo. Es una señal de margen de seguridad, no prueba de beneficio ni autorización para apostar.

en: Small, shifted historical holdout.
Screenshot price and team information can move before kickoff.
Historical profitability is not validated.
es: Holdout histórico pequeño y con cambio de régimen.
La cuota y la información de equipos pueden cambiar antes del inicio.
La rentabilidad histórica no está validada.

why_ranked.es: Clasificada por utilidad conservadora de valor esperado tras penalizar desacuerdo de mercado y riesgo del mercado.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Algeria lost 3-0 to Argentina. Austria beat Jordan 3-1 after the match remained level until the 77th minute. Both had June 22 second matches after the cutoff, so later form, cards and availability were unavailable.
research.injuries_suspensions: Austria: Christoph Baumgartner was reported before the tournament as missing through injury. Algeria: match-specific confirmed injury information was unavailable. Suspensions for June 27 were unavailable because the June 22 matches had not occurred.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Austria's expected core included David Alaba, Konrad Laimer, Marcel Sabitzer and Marko Arnautovic, with Baumgartner unavailable. Algeria's expected core included Riyad Mahrez, Amine Gouiri, Houssem Aouar, Ibrahim Maza, Rayan Ait-Nouri and Ramy Bensebaini. No confirmed XI or post-June 22 changes were available.
research.motivation_group_state: Group J as of June 21: Austria 3 pts, GD +2; Algeria 0 pts, GD -3. Austria still had Argentina and Algeria had Jordan on June 22, so the exact qualification requirement for this final fixture was unavailable.
research.weather_venue_notes: Kansas City Stadium is the open-air Arrowhead Stadium, with a 21:00 local kickoff. Late-June heat, humidity and thunderstorms can matter; a reliable match-time forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Jordan win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 2.6% means roughly 3 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Jordania
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 2.6% significa aproximadamente 3 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 22.8% means roughly 23 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 22.8% significa aproximadamente 23 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Argentina win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 74.6% means roughly 75 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Argentina
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 74.6% significa aproximadamente 75 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Jordan
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.41 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Jordania
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.41 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Argentina
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 2.53 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Argentina
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 2.53 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 56.4% is the model probability; 1.77 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 56.4% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.77 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 43.6% is the model probability; 2.29 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 43.6% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.29 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.2% is the model probability; 3.20 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.2% es la probabilidad del modelo; 3.20 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 68.8% is the model probability; 1.45 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 68.8% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.45 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Jordan -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 4.3% is the model win probability; 23.39 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Jordania -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 4.3% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 23.39 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

warning.en: A true guaranteed arbitrage requires all mutually exclusive outcomes to be covered and the inverse-odds sum to be below 1. Two-outcome hedges can still lose the full stake on the uncovered outcome.
warning.es: Un arbitraje garantizado real requiere cubrir todos los resultados mutuamente excluyentes y que la suma de inversas de cuotas sea menor que 1. Las coberturas de dos resultados aún pueden perder todo el monto si cae el resultado no cubierto.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Jordan lost 3-1 to Austria but generated four shots on target and Ali Olwan scored the country's first World Cup goal. Argentina beat Algeria 3-0. Both had June 22 second matches after the cutoff, making final-round form and team news unavailable.
research.injuries_suspensions: Jordan: star striker Yazan Al-Naimat was reported out of the tournament through injury. Argentina: Cristian Romero had carried a recent injury into the squad, but his June 27 availability was unavailable. Suspensions were unavailable because the June 22 matches had not occurred.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Jordan must continue without Al-Naimat; otherwise no confirmed XI was available. Argentina were expected to retain an experienced core around Lionel Messi, Julian Alvarez/Lautaro Martinez and the established midfield, but rotation or workload management for June 27 could not be assessed before the June 22 Austria match.
research.motivation_group_state: Group J as of June 21: Argentina 3 pts, GD +3; Jordan 0 pts, GD -2. Argentina still had Austria and Jordan had Algeria on June 22, so the exact qualification and rotation state for June 27 was unavailable.
research.weather_venue_notes: Dallas Stadium is AT&T Stadium in Arlington, a retractable-roof, climate-controlled venue, with a 21:00 local kickoff. Roof status and a reliable external forecast were unavailable by the cutoff.

predictions.venue: Venue not verified in available source

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

explanation.en: Research-only double-discount check: the saved market implied probability must be no more than half the model decision probability. This is a margin-of-safety flag, not proof of profit or authorization to bet.
